stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is the approach lighting system of Runway 21 at Netherlands De Kooy airport?

options.a: CAT I approach light system with barrette type lights on the extended centre line.
options.b: CAT I approach light system with individual lights on the extended centre line.
options.c: Simple approach light system with barrette type lights on the extended centre line.
options.d: Simple approach light system with individual lights on the extended centre line.
